_comment: Rule summaries for skills and equipment. Fill in 'summary' fields to provide compact explanations for agents. The 'id' corresponds to the skill/equipment ID in metadata.json.

58.name: Mimetism
58.summary: Imposes a negative Modifier on the attacker's BS (-3 or -6). Reduced/cancelled by MSV.

201.name: Neurocinetics
201.summary: User can react with full Burst in ARO. Active turn Burst is reduced to 1.

84.name: Super-Jump
84.summary: Move with Super-Jump skill. Can jump horizontally or vertically. No fall damage.

189.name: Tactical Awareness
189.summary: Grants an extra Irregular Order usable only by this trooper.

119.name: Lieutenant
119.summary: Trooper is the Lieutenant. Grants +1 Command Token if on field. Loss puts army in Loss of Lieutenant.

64.name: Paramedic
64.summary: Specialist. Can use MediKit (PH-3). Revive Unconscious to W1 or remove immobilized/stunned.

65.name: Doctor
65.summary: Specialist. Can use MediKit (PH). Revive Unconscious to W1 or remove states. Reroll failed heal.

56.name: Engineer
56.summary: Specialist. Repair Structure, Burnt, Imm-A/B, Isolated, Targeted. Deactivates mines.

59.name: Forward Observer
59.summary: Specialist. Flash Pulse. Target enemies (Targeted state) with WIP roll.

82.name: Stealth
82.summary: Move short skills without generating AROs if outside LoF and ZoC. Cautious Move.

28.name: Climbing Plus
28.summary: Move on vertical surfaces as if horizontal. Can stop on vertical surfaces.

40.name: Forward Deployment
40.summary: Deploy outside Deployment Zone. L1: +4", L2: +8".

213.name: Courage
213.summary: Can choose to fail Guts Roll. Ignore Retreat state effects.

235.name: Veteran
235.summary: Ignore Isolated and Retreat states. Regular orders in Loss of Lieutenant.

254.name: Immunity
254.summary: Immune to specific traits (e.g. Critical, Shock, AP). Check specific immunity type.

243.name: Martial Arts
243.summary: CC modifiers. L1: Stealth. L2: Courage. L3: First Strike. L4/5: CC bonuses.

263.name: Fireteam
263.summary: Trooper can join specific Fireteams. Bonuses for 2, 3, 4, 5 members (BS, Burst, Sixth Sense).

29.name: Camouflage
29.summary: Deploy as Marker (-3 to Discover). Stealth. Surprise Attack (-3).

47.name: Infiltration
47.summary: Deploy up to half table. Roll PH-3 for enemy half. Fail: user DZ.

35.name: Combat Jump
35.summary: Deploy on any table edge on PH roll. Fail: own DZ.

33.name: Parachutist
33.summary: Deploy on table edge (Deployment Phase) or enter from side edge (Active Turn).

67.name: Sixth Sense
67.summary: Ignore Stealth. Delay ARO against camo. 360 LoF vs Attacks. Ignore Data Scan mods.

86.name: No Wound Incapacitation
86.summary: Unconscious state becomes NWI state (operational). 2nd wound -> Dead.

21.name: Martial Arts L3
21.summary: CC Attack (+3 to hit). First Strike (ignore enemy CC attack).

22.name: Martial Arts L4
22.summary: CC Attack (+3 to hit, +3 Damage or -6 to enemy). 2 Wounds in CC.

23.name: Martial Arts L5
23.summary: CC Attack (+6 to hit, +3 Damage or -6 to enemy). 2 Wounds in CC.

114.name: Multispectral Visor
114.summary: Ignores visual modifiers. L1 ignores Mimetism(-3). L2 ignores all Mimetism and Smoke.

100.name: Repeater
100.summary: Extends Hacking Area of allied Hackers. Enemies in ZoC are in Hacking Area.

106.name: Hacking Device
106.summary: Allows use of Hacking Programs. Base device (Standard).

240.name: MediKit
240.summary: Heal/Repair. Ranged or B2B. PH roll usually.

239.name: ECM
239.summary: Defensive mods against Guided (L1 -3, L2 -6) or Hacking (Hacker -3).
